title: atriplex patula var. obtusa
intro: Atriplex patula var. obtusa is a variety of the orache plant, also known as sea purslane, a succulent plant that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary issues. The health benefits of Atriplex patula var. obtusa include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or salves, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
